variable_overwrite.description: Session variable overwrite -- same session variable used for multiple purposes (auth state, password reset, MFA) allows cross-feature manipulation

probes.description: Password reset then access authenticated pages -- initiate password reset flow (sets session user context), then access authenticated endpoints without logging in
Registration flow session carryover -- complete registration flow then access admin features; registration may set role/privilege session vars that persist
MFA bypass via session puzzling -- start MFA verification for one action, use session state to bypass MFA on different action

session_race.description: Session race conditions -- concurrent requests manipulate same session variables, causing inconsistent state

probes.description: Concurrent session modification -- send login and password-reset simultaneously; race may leave session in elevated state
Step-skipping via parallel requests -- send step-1 and step-3 of multi-step flow simultaneously; session may accept step-3 without completing step-2 validation

session_fixation_variant.description: Session fixation via session puzzling -- force victim into attacker-controlled session state without traditional fixation

probes.description: Session not regenerated after auth state change -- check if session ID remains same after login/logout/privilege change, enabling session fixation
